name: MoneyGram
description_short: Sacramento, CA's MoneyGram at 2636 Marconi Ave offers money transfers and check cashing, open 7AM-10PM daily.
description_long:
The MoneyGram location at 2636 Marconi Ave in Sacramento, CA is a standalone check-cashing and money transfer store. This Sacramento branch operates daily from 7AM to 10PM, making it accessible for early-morning money transfers and evening cash needs. Whether you need to send money nationally or cash a check after work, this Marconi Ave location in Sacramento provides the convenience you need.

This Sacramento MoneyGram offers a full range of money transfer services, including domestic and international transfers. The location also provides check-cashing services for personal and business checks. For details about transfer limits or exchange rates at this 2636 Marconi Ave location in Sacramento, CA, call +1 800-746-7287.

If you're a Sacramento, CA resident or visitor needing a quick money transfer or check cashed, this Marconi Ave location serves you any day of the week with extended hours. Bring a valid government-issued ID for check cashing and money transfer transactions. MoneyGram offers convenient payment solutions.
pros: 28+ conveniently located pickup points across Sacramento, including major retailers like Walmart open until 11:59 PM
Accessible both online and offline—customers can initiate transfers via website or in-person at agent locations
No bank account required for sending or receiving money, serving unbanked and underbanked populations
Established global network enabling both domestic and international money transfers
Multiple agent types available (Walmart, Save Mart, Ace Cash Express, specialty markets) for geographic flexibility
Extended hours at some locations—Walmart agents open early (7 AM) for morning convenience
Real-time location search by address, city, state, or ZIP code on their website
cons: No direct company locations—service quality and hours entirely dependent on individual third-party agent partners
Fees and exact transfer speeds not disclosed on the location finder; customers must contact agents directly for pricing
Limited information about competitive advantages or service differentiation from other transfer services like Western Union
Some agent locations have restricted hours (some don't open until 9 AM or 11 AM), limiting after-hours access
Physical location dependency means service is not available 24/7 despite some online transfer capabilities
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals who need cash-based money transfer without a bank account
Sacramento residents sending money domestically or internationally to family or recipients without bank accounts
Customers who prefer in-person transactions and want to verify transfer completion at a physical location
People needing money transfer services at extended hours, particularly those near 24-hour Walmart locations
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best suited for unbanked consumers, immigrants sending international remittances, and anyone needing accessible cash-based money transfers across Sacramento's 28+ agent locations. The primary limitation is complete dependence on third-party retailers for service delivery, meaning fees, hours, and service quality vary by location—rates and exact terms require direct contact with individual agents.
services: Domestic money transfers within the United States
Online money transfer initiation through website
In-person cash pickup at agent locations
Real-time location search and filtering by Sacramento neighborhood
Money order services (implied through check-cashing partner model)
Bill payment services (indicated through agent partnerships)
Wire transfer services through agent locations
No bank account required transfer options
meta_description: MoneyGram at 2636 Marconi Ave, Sacramento, CA. Money transfers and check cashing, 7AM-10PM daily.
